title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd!
